{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's marble
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] possesses a glass marble containing a ball of perfectly round darkness.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
